backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the Work-Quickie backend with types and state for user profiles, seeker/poster profiles, job listings, applications, and ratings, plus CRUD and query functions with role-based access control via a mixin authorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Work-Quickie logo image was integrated into Layout.tsx and LandingPage.tsx as a static asset, replacing text-only placeholders.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend page and component file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose and key UI/logic responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Work-Quickie SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that defines all TanStack Router routes, the root layout with the app shell, and the home route logic for authentication-based redirects and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable access-denied UI component displaying a shield icon, a configurable message, and a back-navigation button for unauthorized route access.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks authentication and admin status via hooks, rendering an AccessDeniedScreen or loading skeleton before allowing children to render.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationsList: Displays a list of a seeker's job applications with status badges (Pending/Accepted/Rejected), loading skeletons, and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/JobFilters.tsx: Sidebar filter panel for the job board with keyword search, location, job type select, skills tag input, and a pay range slider, plus a reset button.
frontend/src/components/JobListingCard.t: Renders a job listing card with title, location, pay, skills, and type badge. Supports three display modes (browse, poster, seeker) with conditional action buttons for editing, deleting, or viewing applicants.
frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, stats bar, and job type badges. Includes login/get-started and browse-jobs CTAs using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell with a sticky header containing the logo, desktop/mobile navigation, and an authenticated user dropdown menu with logout and dashboard links. Wraps page content as children.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Onboarding screen that prompts new users to choose between a job seeker or job poster role, navigating to the corresponding onboarding route on selection.
frontend/src/components/RatingDisplay.ts: Displays a user's average star rating and a list of up to five individual reviews with scores, dates, and optional comments. Exports a reusable StarRating sub-component.
frontend/src/components/RatingForm.tsx: Interactive form for submitting a 1–5 star rating with an optional comment for a given user. Handles hover states, validation, submission via a mutation hook, and success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/TagInput.tsx: Controlled tag input component that adds tags on Enter or comma and removes them via backspace or an X button. Enforces a configurable maximum tag count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, seeker/poster profiles, job listings, applications, ratings, and admin operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including light/dark theme color tokens, shadows, and gradient utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page protected by AdminGuard that displays analytics cards and tabbed tables for managing job listings, seekers, and posters with approve/remove/verify actions.
frontend/src/pages/JobApplicantsView.tsx: Page for job posters to view and manage applicants for a specific job listing, showing seeker profiles, ratings, application messages, and accept/reject actions with an optional rating form.
frontend/src/pages/JobBoard.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable job board page with a sidebar for desktop filters and a slide-out sheet for mobile filters, fetching job listings via `useSearchJobs` and rendering them as cards or skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Shows full details for a single job listing (fetched by ID from route params) including poster info, ratings, and an application form with cover message for authenticated job seekers.
frontend/src/pages/JobPostingForm.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a job listing (title, description, skills, location, pay, type), supporting both create and edit modes based on the presence of a route `jobId` param.
frontend/src/pages/PosterDashboard.tsx: Dashboard for job posters showing their profile, average rating, and tabbed lists of active/inactive job listings with options to create, edit, deactivate, or reactivate listings.
frontend/src/pages/PosterProfileForm.tsx: Form for creating or editing a poster profile (name, company name, contact info), pre-populating fields from existing profile data and saving via `useCreatePosterProfile`.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerDashboard.tsx: Displays the job seeker's dashboard with profile info, availability toggle, matched/recommended jobs, and application list with status counts using tabbed navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerProfileForm.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a job seeker profile, including fields for name, bio, skills, qualifications, experience, and portfolio URL, with pre-population from existing profile data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the frontend design system.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing Work-Quickie's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for a React/TypeScript + Motoko job marketplace app.
